opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of these schedules becomes a hard problem when you factor in LLM provider latency spikes and tool failures—a simple retry policy often isn't enough. Consider a hierarchical scheduler, prioritizing critical dependencies and allowing for graceful degradation if a sub-task fails; that's how we handle orchestration in high-throughput agent systems. It’s surprisingly tricky to build a system that *feels* consistently responsive even when individual components are unreliable.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM requests across providers and orchestrating tool use for agents gives me a perspective on the challenges of scheduling and dependency management in this space.
